title: Xtra Creamy Argentinian Gorgonzola Pasta
description: A rich and creamy pasta dish featuring gorgonzola dolce, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this Argentinian inspired recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat, with an al dente finish and a buddhist temple friendly vibe.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a kadhai, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the heavy cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the cream simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the gorgonzola dolce until it is fully melted and the sauce is smooth.
Add the cooked pasta to the kadhai and toss it in the gorgonzola sauce until the pasta is well coated.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top it with the grated parmesan cheese.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
